items.name_cn:
Code: 666203
[MCM] Anya Mini Basket Bag has two carrying options: use the rivet top handle or a detachable shoulder strap. This small bag is crafted from Visetos print coated canvas with a checkered interior, a top zipper to protect personal items, and is an ideal choice for travel. Detachable leather shoulder strap
Rivet-decorated leather handle
Top zipper closure
Single bag, printed cotton-texture canvas lining
Dimensions: 20x17x9cm

items.name_en: MCM Stark Visetos
items.name_cn:
MCM Stark Visetos
Medium-Large Rivet Backpack
Newly Upgraded Version
Exclusive®️ Cognac print full coverage
Unisex backpack # The ceiling of backpacks. This backpack has a structured shape and is adorned with luxurious Nappa leather trim, ample interior space, and pyramid rivets on the sides for a bold look.
Model: MMK6SVE37CO001
Dimensions: 38*13*30cm
Strap: 71-87cm adjustable
Zipper: Dual-direction full closure
Color: Cognac/Brown🏾

items.name_en: MCM Stark Visetos
items.name_cn:
MCM Stark Visetos
Bebe Boo Rivet Backpack
dp Exclusive®️ Classic Cognac
Officially called X mini# This is a miniature version of the classic MCM. We use the iconic Visetos coated canvas with a luxurious faux leather lining and riveted trim. The item fits various looks; the innovative design allows the strap to instantly transform it into a crossbody bag, backpack, shoulder bag, waist bag, and handbag. Show off your new style with this extra-mini Stark backpack.
Model: MMK6SVE92CO001
Size: 21*10*17.5cm
Color: Cognac/Brown
